name: itamin-core
description: ITAMIN - 飲食店向けプラグイン型オールインワン業務・人材育成SaaS

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.verify: npm run verify:types && npm run verify:build && npm run verify:unit && npm run verify:e2e
scripts.verify:build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run seed:demo && npm run test:e2e --workspace=frontend
